TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sa'aniwan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 153 buwan, 303 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 275 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 28 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 86%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Sa'aniwan hya' ga Tomiyac. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Sa'aniwan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēa Ēaniwan …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ¶~ ®inkoŇč s~…ēoŇč, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēa Ēaniwan ńßja Ē …£a tomija ¶~ ®. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan alaŇč s~…ēa Ēaniwan …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Sa'aniwan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 153 buwan, 303 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 275 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 28 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 86%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Sa'aniwan hya' ga Tomiyac. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Sa'aniwan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
